text.value: Fever lasting two weeks or more without a known cause and not showing signs of recovery despite taking medication
Persistant Cough for two weeks or more
Losing weight or becoming thin for two weeks or more
Contact ID of the logged in user
Facility ID for the parent user
Name of the logged in user
Coughing up phlegm mixed with blood for two weeks or more
Getting evening fevers for two weeks or more
Persistant Cough for two weeks or more
Experiencing excessive night sweats for two weeks or more
Losing weight or becoming thin for two weeks or more
Which of these symptoms do you have?
Client refused to provide a sample
He/She didn't have any phlegm this time.
Uchunguzi wa watu wa karibu zaidi ya miaka 5
Uchunguzi wa watu wa karibu hadi miaka 5
Homa ya wiki mbili au zaidi bila kujua sababu na haonyeshi dalili za kupona akiwa anatumia dawa
Kukohoa mfululizo kwa wiki mbili au zaidi
Kupungua uzito, kushindwa kuongezeka uzito, kushindwa kukua
Je mtoto ana dalili yoyote kati ya hizi?
Andika namba ya wilaya ya Index
Andika initials za majina ya Index
Anaishi kwa nyumba moja na Index?
Kumbuka kwamba ugonjwa wa TB si wa kurogwa au kurithi Ugonjwa wa TB unatibika kwa dawa za hospitali
Njia ya kuzuia maambukizi: Kikohozi salama Kuepuka mikusanyiko ya watu wengi Kukaa sehemu inayopitisha upepo wa kutosha Kugundua wagonjwa na kuwatibu mapema
<span style="color:#f58a1f">Kwa CHW:- Uliza kama kuna swali.</.span>
Njia za maambukizi ni: Unaambukizwa kwa hewa wakati mtu anakohoa, kupiga chafya, kuongea, kuimba, kucheka.
TB ni janga ya kitaifa ambayo inaathiri dunia ikiwemo Tanzania. Huku Zanzibar wagonjwa wengi wa TB wanagundulikana kila mwaka.
Kutoa makohozi yaliyochanganyika na damu, wiki mbili au zaidi
Kupata homa za jioni, wiki mbili au zaidi
Kukohoa mfululizo kwa wiki mbili au zaidi
Kutoka jasho jingi nyakati za usiku, wiki mbili au zaidi
Kupungua uzito au kukonda, wiki mbili au zaidi
Chukua sampuli ya kikohozi. Umechukua sampuli?
Je una dalili yeyote kati ya tulizozitaja?
Mpe rufaa mteja. ELEZA: Nakupa rufaa ya kwenda kituo cha afya cha karibu. Nitarudi baada ya siku tatu kuhakikisha ulikamilisha hii rufaa.
TB ni nini? TB ni ugonjwa sugu wa kuambukizwa Unasababishwa na vimelea wanaojulikana kama Mycobacterium Tuberculosis

Dalili za TB ni hizi: Kukohoa mfululizo kwa wiki mbili au zaidi Kutoa makohozi yaliyochanganyika na damu, wiki mbili au zaidi Kupata homa za jioni, wiki mbili au zaidi Kupungua uzito au kukonda, wiki mbili au zaidi Kutoka jasho jingi nyakati za usiku, wiki mbili au zaidi Na dalili zinginezo
Mtu akiwa na dalili moja au zaidi kunauwezekano mkubwa ana TB
Aina za TB: TB ya mapafu TB ya nje ya mapafu

bind.relevant: ( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms != "" and selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms , "persistent_cough") and not(selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms , "cough_with_blood"))) and selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/is_cough_with_phlegm , "yes") and selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/does_client_have_tb_symptoms , "yes")

/tb_investigation/tb_investigation/did_chv_take_sample = "yes" and /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/does_client_have_tb_symptoms = "yes" and /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/is_cough_with_phlegm = 'yes' and /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms != "" and (selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms , "cough_with_blood") or selected( /tb_investigation/tb_investigation/client_tb_symptoms , "persistent_cough"))

/tb_investigation/index_child_tb_symptoms/child_tb_symptoms != "" and (selected( /tb_investigation/index_child_tb_symptoms/child_tb_symptoms ,"persistent_cough") or selected( /tb_investigation/index_child_tb_symptoms/child_tb_symptoms , "weight_loss") or selected( /tb_investigation/index_child_tb_symptoms/child_tb_symptoms ,"lack_of_alertness") or selected( /tb_investigation/index_child_tb_symptoms/child_tb_symptoms ,"fever"))
